proposed.label: Permit search input
proposed.validation_message: Search term is required before a fixture preview can proceed.
proposed.redaction_policy: Redact owner names, account IDs, email addresses, phone numbers, and street-unit details.
proposed.selector_confidence_note: Fixture selector includes form scope and stable input name; confidence high.

proposed.label: Upload action disabled preview
proposed.validation_message: Uploads are excluded from fixture-first preview.
proposed.redaction_policy: No uploaded documents or private values may be committed.
proposed.selector_confidence_note: Blocked because upload actions are outside read-only preview scope.
